title: Disney KNOWS The Mandalorian and Grogu Can't Save Star Wars.
description:
Disney is reportedly worried internally about the performance of The Mandalorian and Grogu, as fans and casuals don't seem too impressed with the upcoming Disney Plus spinoff. Is this Star Wars' last chance, or could Starfighter turn things around next year?
